data.title: Yuga Labs sells Moonbirds to Orange Cap Games
data.description:
Yuga Labs sold the intellectual property rights of Moonbirds, including the Mythics and Oddities collection. The buyer, Orange Cap Games, will expand the collection and use it for physical gaming cards.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/yuga-labs-sells-moonbirds-to-orange-cap-games/

data.description:

HashKey Group continued to expand XRP-focused investments amid high odds of ETF and reserve asset buzz. This has made crypto analysts increasingly bullish about an upcoming […] The post XRP News: Listing By Institution-Only Exchange, Price Rally To $2

data.title: Altcoin Bloodbath: Ethereum, Solana, XRP Plunge
data.description:
TL;DR The crypto market dropped 2. 8%, dragging altcoins down with it. Dogecoin fell 11%, and Solana lost 6. 5% in just 24 hours. Bitcoin held up better, sliding 2. 2% to $104,000, while its dominance climbed past 64%, the highest level since 2021. Caution is growing due to tensions between Trump and China, and limited liquidity is. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/altcoin-bloodbath-ethereum-solana-xrp-plunge/
